title: Pets Load Chunks
description: Loads the chunks tamed pets are in, enabling use of them as chunk loaders while they're sitting around and fixing teleportation across oceans.
body:
# Pet TP Mod

Simply loads chunks that tamed pets are in so they do not get lost when travelling across long distances.

## Notes

- This mod **does not load chunks when pets are sitting**
- I am unsure if this works with other pet mods, mileage may vary
- Any questions or bug reports are welcome [on Discord](https://discord.gg/mTDBVrd7qT)
